task: ClaudeClaw trading agent — advance real-money gate from 0/7 to 7/7 boxes closed.
current_state: ClaudeClaw pm2 id 8 online. Gates 5+6 CLOSED. Gate 7 pending operator A1/A2/A3 acks in MISSION.md. PPLX key quota exhausted — needs replacement before news-sync cron fires. db-backup cron active (next fire ~4am UTC). 647/647 tests. .claude/settings.json created with pm2 list + pm2 logs allow entries.
constraints: Tier 3 actions require explicit operator approval: changing POLY_MAX_TRADE_USD, lifting halt switch, deploying to risk-gates.ts or paper-broker.ts, enabling real-money mode.
No new strategy/asset class until existing two have 30-day track record.
Every sprint touching src/poly/ or src/trading/ requires a docs/research/sprint-N-topic.md before commit (pre-commit hook enforces).
30-min speed tripwire: sprint under 30 min end-to-end signals skipped steps.
TRUST.md bright lines are absolute: no harm, no data leakage, no undisclosed real-money.
pm2 restart must use --update-env when .env has changed — plain restart silently ignores new keys.
discovered_issues: PPLX key returned 401 quota-exceeded on 2026-04-22 news-sync smoke test — replace at perplexity.ai/account/api/keys, update .env, restart with --update-env.
Gate 7 (operator written sign-off) pending: operator must strike PROPOSED from A1/A2/A3 entries in MISSION.md sign-off log.
Iran diplomatic meeting position expired 2026-04-22 — confirm resolution-fetch cron wrote status=lost on 2026-04-26 07:00 ET run.
30-day no-intervention gate clock started 2026-04-21 — target 2026-05-21. Any manual pm2 restart counts against it.

decisions_made.decision: Auth guard added to bot.command('poly') handler via ALLOWED_CHAT_ID check
decisions_made.rationale: Grammy command handlers run independently of middleware — any Telegram user could halt/resume the engine without the guard. P1 security fix, commit d186090.

decisions_made.decision: renderPnl unrealized sum uses INNER JOIN against open trades
decisions_made.rationale: Stale poly_positions rows from crashed/resolved trades inflated the unrealized total. Consistent with strategy-engine.ts query. P1 fix, commit d186090.

decisions_made.decision: .claude/settings.json allowlist uses Bash(pm2 list) and Bash(pm2 logs *) only
decisions_made.rationale: These were the only two non-auto-allowed read-only commands with >=3 uses in the last 50 sessions. All other common commands (ls, grep, git, ps) are already auto-allowed by Claude Code.

decisions_made.decision: Space Agent ecosystem config uses hardcoded Windows cwd path
decisions_made.rationale: pm2 resolves script paths relative to invocation dir, not ecosystem file; absolute path is the only reliable option on Windows.

next_steps: Operator: replace PPLX key in .env (perplexity.ai/account/api/keys), then run: pm2 restart claudeclaw --update-env
Operator: ack A1/A2/A3 in MISSION.md sign-off log (strike PROPOSED from three Phase A entries) — closes gate box 7.
2026-04-26 Sun 07:00 ET: resolution-fetch cron runs — first calibration batch. Iran position should show status=lost.
After calibration data exists: decide flag-enable for Sprint 8 (exits), Sprint 9 (exposure-aware sizing), Sprint 2.5 (reflection). All Tier 3.
do_not: Do not use plain pm2 restart when .env has changed — always use pm2 restart claudeclaw --update-env.
Do not enable POLY_EXIT_ENABLED, POLY_REFLECTION_ENABLED, or POLY_EXPOSURE_AWARE_SIZING without calibration data (Tier 3).
Do not add a third strategy or asset class until 30-day track record on existing two.
Do not restore personal-assistant features stripped in 2026-04-13 pivot.
Do not silence pm2 alerts or log spam without fixing root cause.
Do not run cdp.mjs commands without file redirect (> /tmp/out.txt 2>&1) — direct stdout drops in git bash.
